message:
feat(phylodynamics): add ancestral sequence reconstruction

Implement ancestral sequence reconstruction for internal tree nodes:
- Add computeConsensus() using majority vote parsimony
- Gaps and N's are skipped when computing consensus where possible
- Add reconstructAncestralSequences() for recursive tree traversal
- Store reconstructed sequences in internal TreeNode.sequence field

This enables dN/dS (selection) analysis to compare ancestral and
derived sequences at each branch, improving evolutionary analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
